rules.name: cv_local_alone
rules.description: Retake when cv-local face-quad fit is NOT structurally consistent (status != 'ok').

rules.name: phase_or_cv_T8.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 8.0 OR cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_or_cv_T11.7
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 11.7 OR cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_or_cv_T15.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 15.0 OR cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_and_cv_T8.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 8.0 AND cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_and_cv_T11.7
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 11.7 AND cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_and_cv_T15.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 15.0 AND cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: cv_severe_alone
rules.description: Retake when cv-local status is `fewer_than_3_face_quads` (the more severe failure mode — geometry couldn't even find 3 faces).

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_fit_residual_T80.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR fit_residual >= 80.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_fit_residual_T100.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR fit_residual >= 100.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_fit_residual_T150.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR fit_residual >= 150.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_pnp_rms_T60.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR pnp_rms >= 60.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_pnp_rms_T100.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR pnp_rms >= 100.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_pnp_rms_T150.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR pnp_rms >= 150.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_hex_bezel_T50.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR hex_bezel >= 50.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_hex_bezel_T80.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR hex_bezel >= 80.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_hex_bezel_T120.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR hex_bezel >= 120.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_ensemble_shift_T20.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR ensemble_shift >= 20.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_ensemble_shift_T40.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR ensemble_shift >= 40.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_ensemble_shift_T60.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR ensemble_shift >= 60.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_junction_below_T50.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR junction_score < 50.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_junction_below_T100.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR junction_score < 100.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_junction_below_T150.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR junction_score < 150.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_junction_below_T200.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR junction_score < 200.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_fit80.0_OR_hex50.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR fit_residual >= 80.0 OR hex_bezel >= 50.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_fit100.0_OR_hex80.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR fit_residual >= 100.0 OR hex_bezel >= 80.0.

rules.name: phaseANDcv_OR_fit150.0_OR_hex120.0
rules.description: Retake when (|phase|<8 AND cv-fail) OR fit_residual >= 150.0 OR hex_bezel >= 120.0.
